slots.main: Main content area for the contact-us page
slots.contact-us-page: The root HTML element of the contact-us page
slots.contact-us-body: The body element of the contact-us page
slots.contact-us-hero: Hero section of the contact-us page
slots.contact-us-title: Main title of the contact-us page
slots.contact-us-form-header: Header section for the contact form
slots.contact-us-header-icon: Icon in the form header section
slots.contact-us-header-title: Title in the form header section
slots.contact-us-content: Main content section containing form and contact info
slots.contact-form-row-1: First row of the contact form containing name and email fields
slots.contact-name-field: Container for the name input and label
slots.contact-name-label: Label for the name input field
slots.contact-name-input: Input field for the user's name
slots.contact-email-field: Container for the email input and label
slots.contact-email-label: Label for the email input field
slots.contact-email-input: Input field for the user's email
slots.contact-form-row-2: Second row of the contact form containing phone and subject fields
slots.contact-phone-field: Container for the phone input and label
slots.contact-phone-label: Label for the phone input field
slots.contact-phone-input: Input field for the user's phone number
slots.contact-subject-field: Container for the subject input and label
slots.contact-subject-label: Label for the subject input field
slots.contact-subject-input: Input field for the message subject
slots.contact-message-field: Container for the message textarea and label
slots.contact-message-input: Textarea for the user's message content
slots.contact-submit-btn: Submit button for the contact form
slots.contact-info-title: Title of the contact information section
slots.contact-card-1: First service card in the contact page
slots.contact-card-img-1: Image in the first service card
slots.contact-card-content-1: Content container of the first service card
slots.contact-card-title-1: Title of the first service card
slots.contact-card-desc-1: Description of the first service card

slots.contact-card-img-2: Image in the second service card
slots.contact-card-content-2: Content container of the second service card
slots.contact-card-title-2: Title of the second service card
slots.contact-card-desc-2: Description of the second service card

slots.contact-card-img-3: Image in the third service card
slots.contact-card-content-3: Content container of the third service card
slots.contact-card-title-3: Title of the third service card
slots.contact-card-desc-3: Description of the third service card
